creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
% pkg_info |grep powermanga
powermanga-0.80     An arcade 2D shoot-em-up
% powermanga
couldn't find/open config directory '/home/amdmi3/.tlkgames'
attempting to create it... ok
configfile::fopen_data(): Warning: Unable to open the file "/home/amdmi3/.tlkgames/powermanga.conf" for read!!!
linuxroutines/chargeFichier() : can't locate file : texts/text_en.txt

The game works after `cp -R texts /usr/local/share/powermanga/` with texts directory from powermanga archive

How-To-Repeat: see above
